document_id: 1.DIRECTIVE (UE) 20192161 DU PARLEMENT EUROPÉEN ET DU CONSEIL.html

extracted_info.title: Directive (EU) 2019/2161 of the European Parliament and of the Council amending Council Directive 93/13/EEC and Directives 98/6/EC, 2005/29/EC and 2011/83/EU of the European Parliament and of the Council as regards the better enforcement and modernisation of Union consumer protection rules
key_requirements: Improving the enforcement of consumer protection rules and increasing the deterrence of infringements
Enhancing transparency for consumers, including on online marketplaces
Providing for stronger consumer remedies and better redress possibilities
